subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh today amongst the people, verily He is the Lord of the Kingdom [3.5s]... ...O Mahmud! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Almighty, the Loving. I bear witness that thou hast renounced worldly cares
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق الیوم بین القوم انه هو مالک ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @status of kings; future of monarchy
